title: humulus lupulus var. cordifolius
intro: Humulus lupulus var. cordifolius, also known as heartleaf hop or cordifolius hop, is a variety of the hop plant that is native to China and is used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of heartleaf hop include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and potentially reducing the risk of certain diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. Heartleaf hop can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
